name: Fizzy
description: Kanban as it should be. Not as it has been.
compose:
name: slashnode-fizzy
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/mauricewipf/fizzy-umbrel:5f45e54
    container_name: fizzy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      RAILS_ENV: production
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DATABASE_ADAPTER: sqlite
      ACTIVE_STORAGE_SERVICE: local
      SOLID_QUEUE_IN_PUMA: 'true'
      FORCE_SSL: 'false'
      ASSUME_SSL: 'false'
    volumes:
      - server_data-app:/rails/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8005:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-app:
    name: slashnode-fizzy_server_data-app
